title: Gulf states condemn Iran 'blatant aggression' — Kuwait, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, GCC, UAE, Qatar, Egypt, Jordan all condemn; 'unacceptable escalation'
snippet: Bahrain: 'blatant aggression' and 'flagrant violation' of sovereignty. Kuwait: 'direct threat' to civilians and 'dangerous escalation.' Saudi Arabia strongly denounced 'repeated Iranian attacks.' GCC called strikes 'unacceptable escalation and threat to regional and international peace.' UAE, Qatar, Egypt, Jordan expressed solidarity with Kuwait/Bahrain and urged prevention of broader regional conflict.
tag_reason: New coordinated regional response to June 6 BM attack — distinct from June 3 Kuwait airport attack condemnation
